My Sewing Picks

Fabrics & Materials

The colors and textures that bring a project to life — fabric bundles, lace and trims I love to gather for patchwork and everyday makes.

The links below are affiliate links. As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases.

Delicate lace trim for finishing edges, embellishing bags, and adding a handmade touch to any project.
